headline: Is It Too Late To Reassess Palo Alto Networks (PANW) After Its Rapid Share Price Surge?

The stock has moved sharply in recent periods, with returns of 8.3% over the past week, 51.8% over the past month, 55.7% year to date and 41.7% over the last year, which can change how the market views both its potential and its risks.
